settings.editor: We reserve same-day appointments for urgent dental needs. Dr. Bandeff's contact information is available through our answering service for after-hours emergencies.
Dr. Jane Smith, DMD brings years of experience to every patient.

image.alt: Dr. Jane Smith, DMD with team

settings.editor: From a child's first tooth through the teen years, Tooth Story Pediatric Dental delivers comprehensive care for Grapevine families. Dr. Ramolia builds each visit around education, gentle technique, and age-appropriate communication so kids leave with healthier teeth and more confidence.

When a baby tooth needs more support than a filling can give, kid-sized crowns protect your child's smile so they can keep eating, talking, and playing without pain. Dr. Ramolia uses options designed to look and feel natural
Cavities happen, even with great brushing. Our tooth-colored fillings restore your child's tooth quickly and comfortably, with as little time in the chair as possible.
For longer visits or anxious little patients, we offer in-office general anesthesia, oral conscious sedation, and hospital-based care, all overseen by a dedicated anesthesia team.
A knocked-out tooth, a hard fall, or sudden tooth pain can't wait. Call (817) 778-0224 and our Grapevine team will work your child in fast, often the same day.
Routine visits keep small problems small and help your child feel at ease in the dental chair. We pair gentle cleanings with kid-friendly exams every six months.
Children with sensory, developmental, or medical complexities deserve a dental home built for them. Dr. Ramolia and our team take the extra time to make every visit work.

Dr. Blake Bandeff earned his DMD from the University of Connecticut School of Dental Medicine and completed his General Practice Residency at Morristown Medical Center, where he developed a deep focus on implants, wisdom teeth extractions, and cosmetic cases. He completes 50+ hours of continuing education annually to stay current with the latest techniques and technology. His approach centers on attentive, personalized care, taking the time to understand each patient's concerns before recommending treatment. Dr. Bandeff is a member of the American Dental Association, the New Jersey Dental Association, and the Academy of General Dentistry.
